DECLARATION OF CIARAN O'SULLIVAN RE: ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROWBOTHAM & COMPANY LLP

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROWBOTHAM & COMPANY LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTUMN HARVEST EDUCATION GROUP INC. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF ROWBOTHAM IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTUMN HARVEST EDUCATION GROUP THE SUM OF $32,294.79, CONSISTING OF $14,122.99 DUE TO PLAINTIFF FOR SERVICES RENDERED TOGETHER WITH PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST UP TO THE DATE OF TRIAL PURSUANT TO THE CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PARTIES, PLUS $17,190.00 IN REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES EXPENDED BY PLAINTIFF PURSUANT TO THE CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PARTIES, PLUS COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $981.80. (SEE SCANNED DOCOCUMENT)
